name: @capyup/pi-obsidian
description_en: pi extension that wraps the Obsidian CLI as typed tools — read, list, search, outline, create, append, open, backlinks, tags, and daily-append against the active vault.
description_zh: pi 扩展，将 Obsidian CLI 包装为类型化工具 — 对活跃 vault 进行读取、列表、搜索、大纲、创建、附加、打开、反向链接、标签和每日追加操作
